rationale.risk-routing: CLI-side classifier dynamically calculates check-in thresholds based on developer history
rationale.hitl-workflow: Enforces plan checkpoints, approval gates, and hard boundary action guards
rationale.oversight-explanation: Provides check-in explanations, session summaries, and inspectable policy scoring bands
rationale.survey-input: Formative survey of 21 developers on autonomy and oversight preferences
rationale.framework: Provides a single-concern reference architecture for dynamic autonomy governance
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented the Hedwig CLI coding agent as a prototype
rationale.agentic: Evaluates a CLI coding agent performing multi-step repository editing tasks
rationale.steering: Retrieval path injects behavioral guidance into prompt to shape reasoning
